'''âb-v-t''' ('''kabavat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earmark|earmark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earmark|earmark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-v-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabavat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibavat|thibavat]] || [[word:jibavat|jibavat]] || [[word:shibavat|shibavat]] || [[word:kibavat|kibavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubavat|thuthubavat]] || [[word:jujubavat|jujubavat]] || [[word:shushubavat|shushubavat]] || [[word:kukubavat|kukubavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubavat|thubavat]] || [[word:jubavat|jubavat]] || [[word:shubavat|shubavat]] || [[word:kubavat|kubavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubavat|thubavat]] || [[word:jubavat|jubavat]] || [[word:shubavat|shubavat]] || [[word:kubavat|kubavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebavat|thebavat]] || [[word:jebavat|jebavat]] || [[word:shebavat|shebavat]] || [[word:kebavat|kebavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobavat|thothobavat]] || [[word:jojobavat|jojobavat]] || [[word:shoshobavat|shoshobavat]] || [[word:kokobavat|kokobavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobavat|thobavat]] || [[word:jobavat|jobavat]] || [[word:shobavat|shobavat]] || [[word:kobavat|kobavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobavat|thobavat]] || [[word:jobavat|jobavat]] || [[word:shobavat|shobavat]] || [[word:kobavat|kobavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbavat|thĂŠbavat]] || [[word:jĂŠbavat|jĂŠbavat]] || [[word:shĂŠbavat|shĂŠbavat]] || [[word:kĂŠbavat|kĂŠbavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabavat|thathabavat]] || [[word:jajabavat|jajabavat]] || [[word:shashabavat|shashabavat]] || [[word:kakabavat|kakabavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabavat|thabavat]] || [[word:jabavat|jabavat]] || [[word:shabavat|shabavat]] || [[word:kabavat|kabavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabavat|thabavat]] || [[word:jabavat|jabavat]] || [[word:shabavat|shabavat]] || [[word:kabavat|kabavat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabavat|shabavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabavat|goshabavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabavat|gokishabavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabavatnĂŒ|shabavatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabavatnknĂŒ|goshabavatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavatnĂŒ|gokishabavatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabavatshĂ«|shabavatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabavatnkshĂ«|goshabavatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabavatshĂ«|gokishabavatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavatro|shabavatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavatnkro|goshabavatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavatro|gokishabavatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavatmu|shabavatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavatnkmu|goshabavatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavatmu|gokishabavatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabavatsher|shabavatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabavatnksher|goshabavatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabavatsher|gokishabavatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabavatng|shabavatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabavatnkng|goshabavatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabavatng|gokishabavatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabavatya|shabavatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabavatnkya|goshabavatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabavatya|gokishabavatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabavatyam|shabavatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabavatnkyam|goshabavatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabavatyam|gokishabavatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavatnĂŒshĂ«|shabavatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabavatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabavatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavatnĂŒro|shabavatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavatnknĂŒro|goshabavatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavatnĂŒro|gokishabavatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavatnĂŒmu|shabavatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavatnknĂŒmu|goshabavatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavatnĂŒmu|gokishabavatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavatshĂ«nĂŒ|shabavatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabavatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabavatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavatshĂ«ro|shabavatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavatnkshĂ«ro|goshabavatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavatshĂ«ro|gokishabavatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavatshĂ«mu|shabavatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavatnkshĂ«mu|goshabavatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavatshĂ«mu|gokishabavatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavatronĂŒ|shabavatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavatnkronĂŒ|goshabavatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavatronĂŒ|gokishabavatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavatroshĂ«|shabavatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavatnkroshĂ«|goshabavatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavatroshĂ«|gokishabavatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavatromu|shabavatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavatnkromu|goshabavatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavatromu|gokishabavatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavatmunĂŒ|shabavatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavatnkmunĂŒ|goshabavatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavatmunĂŒ|gokishabavatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavatmushĂ«|shabavatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavatnkmushĂ«|goshabavatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavatmushĂ«|gokishabavatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavatmuro|shabavatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavatnkmuro|goshabavatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavatmuro|gokishabavatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
